SystemCodeDisplay (en)DefinitionJSONXML
http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/device-status-reason  onlineOnlineThe device is off.

http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/device-status-reason  standbyStandbyThe device is ready but not actively operating.

http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/device-status-reason  hw-disconHardware DisconnectedThe device hardware is disconnected.
http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/device-status-reason  offOffThe device is off.

SystemCodeDisplay (en)DefinitionJSONXML
http://hl7.org/fhir/device-status  activeActiveThe device record is current and is appropriate for reference in new instances.
http://hl7.org/fhir/device-status  inactiveInactiveThe device record is not current and is not appropriate for reference in new instances.
http://hl7.org/fhir/device-status  entered-in-errorEntered in ErrorThe device record is not current and is not appropriate for reference in new instances.
